SKL_MP4_PIC Struct Reference

#include <skl_mpg4.h>

List of all members.

Public Attributes

SKL_BYTE * Y
SKL_BYTE * U
SKL_BYTE * V
int Coding

int Height
int BpS
SKL_MV * MV
double Time
SKL_UINT64 Time_Ticks
SKL_MP4_MAP * Map
void * Data

Detailed Description

This class is used for storing input/output frame informations such as dimensions, YUV data, time stamps...

Warning : The size of luma component is Width x Height, whereas the U and V components are of size Width/2 x Height/2 each.
However, all of the Y, U and V component planes share the same stride, given by BpS (Bytes Per Scanline).
Here is an example of the layout, with internal hidden edges shown in blue:

Note: This video format is often called "IMC2".

Member Data Documentation

int SKL_MP4_PIC::BpS
 

Bytes Per Scanline

int SKL_MP4_PIC::Coding
 

Coding type. Set by the encoder/decoder. Values: 0:key frame (I-VOP), 1:P-VOP, 2:B-VOP, 3:S/D-VOP, 4: not coded

void* SKL_MP4_PIC::Data
 

(Opaque) Any data pertaining to the analyzer

int SKL_MP4_PIC::Height
 

Height of picture, in pixel.

SKL_MP4_MAP* SKL_MP4_PIC::Map
 

Auxiliary informations, for the analyzer.

SKL_MV* SKL_MP4_PIC::MV
 

Motion Vectors

double SKL_MP4_PIC::Time
 

Presentation time, in seconds

SKL_UINT64 SKL_MP4_PIC::Time_Ticks
 

Presentation time, in ticks

SKL_BYTE* SKL_MP4_PIC::U
 

Pointer to the U-plane data, of size Width/2 x Height/2, with stride BpS

SKL_BYTE* SKL_MP4_PIC::V
 

Pointer to the V plane data, of size Width/2 x Height/2, with stride BpS

int SKL_MP4_PIC::Width
 

Width of picture, in pixel.

SKL_BYTE* SKL_MP4_PIC::Y
 

Pointer to the Y-plane data, of size Width x Height, with stride BpS
